title: CompgitModels
description: Canonical data models for compgit. Single source of truth for TypeScript and Swift — regenerate both with `pnpm gen:schema`.

ContributionLevel.title: ContributionLevel
ContributionLevel.description: GitHub's discretised intensity bucket for a contribution day.

ContributionDay.title: ContributionDay
ContributionDay.description: One day on a GitHub user's contribution calendar.

date.description: ISO-8601 date (YYYY-MM-DD) in the user's GitHub-configured timezone.

contributionCount.description: Total contributions credited on this date.

ContributionsCollection.title: ContributionsCollection
ContributionsCollection.description: Normalised snapshot of a GitHub user's contribution calendar over a fixed window.

from.description: Inclusive lower bound, ISO-8601 UTC string.

to.description: Inclusive upper bound, ISO-8601 UTC string.

fetchedAt.description: When the client received this snapshot, ISO-8601 UTC string.

FollowedDeveloper.title: FollowedDeveloper
FollowedDeveloper.description: A GitHub user the device owner is tracking for comparison.

displayName.description: Optional human-readable label shown in the compare tab.

addedAt.description: When this developer was added, ISO-8601 UTC string.
